channel.description: Osborne Metalworks. A few studio clips from the bench in Gallup, New Mexico. Sterling cuffs, bolo ties, belt buckles, turquoise and coral. Mostly here to watch and learn from other smiths.
channel.keywords: silversmithing lapidary turquoise sterling bolo tie belt buckle stamping repousse stone setting
channel.title: Osborne Metalworks
